title: Röst Sommer
description: A Modpack to enjoy in the summer
body:
The official summerpack 2025 for Röstireich. A light-modded 1.20.1 forge pack, with the following experiences:

* Create (with many addons)
* Exploration: The Aether + new Nether and End + many new structures everywhere
* Magic: Become a witch with "Hexerei", or a shaman with "Totemic"

The optional final goal of the pack is to craft the mahogany broom.
